title: "Charlie makes me emotional": Candace Owens revisits old Charlie Kirk post after reaching new YouTube milestone
summary_full: Candace Owens announced that her YouTube channel has surpassed 6 million subscribers, up from 1.35 million when her independent show launched. She credited viewers for the growth, noting that the platform expanded without advertising or outside investors. Owens also reflected on an old Charlie Kirk post celebrating one million followers, saying its resurgence made her emotional. The milestone highlights the growing influence of independent digital media and audience-driven content creation.
